description.unified: Leaps and deals Physical DMG to enemies within range, and stuns them for [5sec->2sec].

Deals Physical DMG to enemies within range, knocking them back, and reduces their [All DEF by 30%->ATK by 25%] and ATK Spd by [500->20%] for [20sec->4sec]. [(removed) reductions based on Block success]

For [20sec->14sec], increases all allies' Physical DEF by 98*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), Physical [Crit Resistance by 300->Block Chance by 150], and reduces Physical DMG taken by [25%->10%].

On Block, deals Physical DMG in front, reduces the target's ATK by [20%->3.5%] for [8sec->6sec], and increases your Physical DEF by [20%->9%]. These effects stack up to 4 times. [(removed) recovers 300 Mana, P.Crit Resistance boost, and 10sec cooldown]

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by 2000, but pulls nearby enemies toward the target.

light.unified: On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec.
Physical Defense increase amount increases by [40%->50%].

dark.unified: Physical Block Chance additionally increases by [250->100].

light.unified: On block, the Attack reduction effect and Physical Defense increase effect are changed to stack up to 6 times.

description.unified: [Cut Ground] reduces Cooldown by {0}% per enemy hit and increases Stun duration by 1 sec. [(removed) increases All DMG received and recovers Mana]
[Shield Strike] reduces the P.DEF of hit enemies by 25% and their P.Crit Resist by [500->210] for [10 sec -> 4 sec]. [(removed) reduces Crit Chance by {0}]
[Guardian Shield] increases effect duration by 4.5 sec and boosts DEF increase by {0}%. [(removed) removes negative effects on self]
[Vow of Knights] recovers {0}% of Max HP and increases the duration of own P.DEF by 3 sec.

dark.unified: At the start of each battle, increases all allies' [ATK by 15%->Max HP by 10%]. This effect stacks up to 3 times and cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Every 3 skills used, increases all allies' Physical Defense by {0}% and Attack by [{0}->{1}]% for 15 sec. The Physical Defense increase is applied at 2 times its value to the 4 allies with the lowest Physical Defense.
